WHAT WE DO

HVAC Services

Complete heating, cooling, and air quality solutions for residential and commercial properties.

❄️

AC Installation

High-efficiency central air, ductless mini-splits, and heat pump systems. Energy Star certified units.

From $3,499
🔥

Heating Systems

Furnace installation, boiler services, and radiant heating for year-round comfort.

From $2,999
🔧

Repair & Service

Fast diagnostics and repairs for all brands. Same-day service for no-heat/no-cool emergencies.

From $89
✅

Maintenance Plans

Seasonal tune-ups, filter changes, and preventive care to extend system life and efficiency.

$19/mo
🌬️

Indoor Air Quality

Air purifiers, humidifiers, UV lights, and ventilation systems for healthier indoor air.

From $299
🏗️

Ductwork Services

Duct cleaning, sealing, and new installations for optimal airflow and efficiency.

From $399

MAINTENANCE PLANS

Protect Your Investment

Regular maintenance extends system life, improves efficiency, and prevents costly breakdowns. Choose the plan that fits your needs.

Basic

$19/month

Essential maintenance for budget-conscious homeowners

  • ✓1 seasonal tune-up
  • ✓Filter replacement
  • ✓15% repair discount
  • ✓Priority scheduling
  • ✓Phone support
Get Started
Most Popular

Premium

$39/month

Complete coverage for total peace of mind

  • ✓2 seasonal tune-ups
  • ✓Filter replacement
  • ✓25% repair discount
  • ✓Same-day priority
  • ✓No overtime fees
  • ✓Annual duct inspection
  • ✓Thermostat calibration
Get Started

Commercial

$79/month

Tailored plans for businesses and multi-unit properties

  • ✓Quarterly maintenance
  • ✓Full system diagnostics
  • ✓30% repair discount
  • ✓24/7 emergency response
  • ✓Dedicated account manager
  • ✓Compliance reporting
  • ✓Multi-unit discounts

WHY ARCTICAIR

15,000+ Systems Installed

ArcticAir HVAC has been keeping homes and businesses comfortable since 2004. Our NATE-certified technicians are factory-trained on all major brands and committed to energy-efficient solutions.

✓NATE Certified
✓Energy Star Partner
✓All Brands Serviced
✓Financing Available
✓10-Year Warranty
✓24/7 Emergency

Flexible Financing

0% APR for 12 months on new installations. No credit check options available. Ask about our payment plans.

Apply Today

SERVICE AREA

Proudly Serving the Metro Region

Our fleet of fully-stocked service vehicles covers the entire metropolitan area. Same-day service available in most locations.

DowntownWestsideEastsideNorth HillsSouth BayMidtownUptownHarbor DistrictLakewoodRiversideOak ParkMaple HeightsCedar GrovePine ValleyElm District

Don't see your area? Call us — we likely serve your neighborhood too.

TESTIMONIALS

What Our Clients Say

★★★★★

“ArcticAir replaced our 20-year-old AC with a high-efficiency heat pump. Our energy bills dropped 40% and the house has never been more comfortable. Best investment we've made.”

Homeowner

“They maintain HVAC systems across all 5 of our office locations. Their preventive maintenance has virtually eliminated emergency breakdowns. True professionals.”

Sandra Lee

Office Manager

Robert Garcia

Homeowner
